cpu: AMD A8-6410 APU with AMD Radeon R5 Graphics
notes: changing options is like fighting a tank with an stick... nothing happens. just complaining about "no Direct3D device was found"
title: Summoner

notes: For the game to run, you need a glide wrapper. Either nGlide or dgVoodoo would do. Open the launcher (by just running the game) and click"Setup". Let it scan for all, and choose "3DFx Glide". It runs without problem! And with dgVoodoo you can play it at higher resolutions and with Anti-Aliasing!
title: Summoner

notes: You have to use a Glide wrapper like dgVoodoo or nGlide and tell the game to use the Glide backend. I used dgVoodoo. On DirectX the game simply refuses to run. On glide it runs like it's native.
title: Summoner
